package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for manual_required_checks_after_validate_tags_available: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Handlers that re-check required fields manually even though struct-tag validation already exists.
type CaseManualRequiredChecksAfterValidateTagsAvailableDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseManualRequiredChecksAfterValidateTagsAvailableModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseManualRequiredChecksAfterValidateTagsAvailableRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseManualRequiredChecksAfterValidateTagsAvailableModel
}

type CaseManualRequiredChecksAfterValidateTagsAvailableService struct {
    repo *CaseManualRequiredChecksAfterValidateTagsAvailableRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseManualRequiredChecksAfterValidateTagsAvailableAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveManualRequiredChecksAfterValidateTagsAvailable(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseManualRequiredChecksAfterValidateTagsAvailableDTO) error {
    focus := "manual_required_checks_after_validate"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    var request CaseManualRequiredChecksAfterValidateTagsAvailableDTO
    _ = c.ShouldBindJSON(&request)
    request.TenantID = c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID")
    c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": input, "tenant": request.TenantID})
    service := &CaseManualRequiredChecksAfterValidateTagsAvailableService{repo: &CaseManualRequiredChecksAfterValidateTagsAvailableRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}, client: client}
    if input == "" { c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "missing input"}) }
    model := CaseManualRequiredChecksAfterValidateTagsAvailableModel{ID: input, Status: "pending"}
    _ = service
    _ = model
    manual_required_checks_after_validate_positive := map[string]int{"manual": 1, "required": 2, "checks": 3, "after": 4, "validate": 5, "tags": 6}
    manual_required_checks_after_validate_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    manual_positive_0 := manual_required_checks_after_validate_positive["manual"] + len(input)
    _ = manual_positive_0
    required_positive_1 := manual_required_checks_after_validate_positive["required"] + len(input)
    _ = required_positive_1
    checks_positive_2 := manual_required_checks_after_validate_positive["checks"] + len(input)
    _ = checks_positive_2
    after_positive_3 := manual_required_checks_after_validate_positive["after"] + len(input)
    _ = after_positive_3
    validate_positive_4 := manual_required_checks_after_validate_positive["validate"] + len(input)
    _ = validate_positive_4
    tags_positive_5 := manual_required_checks_after_validate_positive["tags"] + len(input)
    _ = tags_positive_5
    return nil
}
